assertionResults.title: injects execution environment details into the agent prompt

assertionResults.title: returns null when agent is disabled

assertionResults.fullName: resolveMemoryContext returns null when memory context is missing
assertionResults.title: returns null when memory context is missing

assertionResults.title: creates a request-only memory prompt when memory context exists

assertionResults.title: uses the shared memory prompt builder

assertionResults.fullName: resolveRoleContext returns null when roleId is missing
assertionResults.title: returns null when roleId is missing

assertionResults.title: returns null when the bound role cannot be found

assertionResults.title: builds one canonical system prompt from role prompt fragments

assertionResults.fullName: resolveSummaryContext returns null when summary is missing or blank
assertionResults.title: returns null when summary is missing or blank

assertionResults.title: builds one system message from normalized summary content

assertionResults.title: returns the original context unchanged for non-realtime questions

assertionResults.title: appends request-only search context and emits start/done chunks on success

assertionResults.title: keeps the original request context and emits an error chunk when the tool fails

assertionResults.title: returns no request messages when neither role nor summary is present

assertionResults.title: resolves role context into the first system message

assertionResults.title: resolves summary context into a system message

assertionResults.title: keeps resolver order stable: role first, summary second
